creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
Fix: 

Postfix 2.3 is about to be released (scheduled for today or tomorrow), and the
mail/postfix port will be updated to that version.  There are people who
prefer to keep the older stable version running, so as in the past, please
repocopy the current mail/postfix to mail/postfix22 for their benefit.

Thanks!
